recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: The Holiday
recommendations.overview: Two women, one American and one British, swap homes at Christmastime following bad breakups. Each woman finds romance with a local man but realizes that the imminent return home may end the relationship.

recommendations.title: The Four of Us
recommendations.overview: After their partner swap experiment takes a turn, four friends arrive at a remote beach hut to face the fallout and purge themselves of deeper truths.

recommendations.title: F*ck Love Too
recommendations.overview: In this romantic comedy, several friends, each dealing with unhappy love lives, turn to each other for help - but not always with the best results.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: The Wild Thornberrys Movie
recommendations.overview: Eliza and Debbie are two sisters who don't always get along. But their relationship is put to the test when Debbie's life is in danger, and Eliza might have to give up her power to talk to animals....

recommendations.title: Fire Island
recommendations.overview: A group of queer best friends gather in the Fire Island Pines for their annual week of love and laughter. However, desires, dramas, drink and drugs push their bonds to the limits.

recommendations.title: Take-Away Romance
recommendations.overview: Amelle and Noom are two young thirties are total opposites and that fate will bring. Serious She manager at Starbucks, and dynamic IT dilettante, smart, and apprentice comic.  Both victims disappointments in love, they swore that it does take longer.

recommendations.title: The 10 Year Plan
recommendations.overview: Myles and Brody are best friends with two very different ways of finding love. Displeased with their current love lives, they make a pact to be together if neither finds love in ten year’s time. Now two months shy of their deadline, both friends set

recommendations.title: Catch and Release
recommendations.overview: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.
